headline: SK Hynix may raise up to $10 billion from US listing, Korea Economic Daily says
summary: South Korea's SK Hynix is considering raising 10 trillion to 15 trillion won ($10.03 billion) through ‌a potential U.S. listing, aiming to expand production capacity for ‌advanced memory chips, the Korea Economic Daily reported. A U.S. listing would give the Nvidia ​supplier access to a wider pool of capital and could help narrow a gap in its valuation compared with global peers such as Micron, the newspaper said. Here are some details: ($1 = 1,495.0000 won)

headline: SK Hynix to Buy $8 Billion of Top-End ASML Chipmaking Gear
summary: (Bloomberg) -- SK Hynix Inc. plans to spend 11.9 trillion won ($7.9 billion) on cutting-edge extreme ultraviolet lithography chipmaking tools from ASML Holding NV, deepening a push into next-generation memory as demand for artificial intelligence infrastructure grows. The deal is valid through 2027, SK Hynix said in a regulatory filing Tuesday. It marks one of the largest of its kind, underscoring how chipmakers are racing to secure the EUV gear essential to mass-producing the world’s most sophi

headline: Why Micron’s AI Windfall Isn’t Convincing Investors
summary: Micron (NASDAQ:MU) just tripled its revenue over its most recent quarter, delivered some of the highest margins in memory history, and guided for continued strength, projecting $33.5 billion in revenue and gross margins expanding to 81% in the current quarter. Yet its stock remains down by 13% since the earnings release.

headline: Musk Terafab Demand Puts Micron HBM Capacity And Valuation In Focus
summary: Elon Musk has launched the Terafab semiconductor manufacturing initiative with a plan to buy as many AI chips as Micron Technology (NasdaqGS:MU) can supply. Micron’s high bandwidth memory, or HBM, capacity is fully committed through 2026, reflecting an industry wide shortage of advanced AI memory. The combination of Musk’s demand plans and tight HBM supply is reshaping how AI chip makers and memory suppliers work together. Micron Technology, traded under ticker NasdaqGS:MU, is a major...

content.title: Musk Terafab Demand Puts Micron HBM Capacity And Valuation In Focus

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Turns Negative As Nasdaq Slides; Palantir Retreats (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes finished in the red Tuesday, as oil prices lifted higher.  Modine Manufacturing surged as Micron Technology and Palantir Technologies fell on the stock market today.  The Dow weakened in the final hour of trading Tuesday and finished the session with a 0.2% loss, after back-and-forth moves throughout the session.

content.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Turns Negative As Nasdaq Slides; Palantir Retreats (Live Coverage)
content.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes finished in the red Tuesday, as oil prices lifted higher.  Modine Manufacturing surged as Micron Technology and Palantir Technologies fell on the stock market today.  The Dow weakened in the final hour of trading Tuesday and finished the session with a 0.2% loss, after back-and-forth moves throughout the session.
